variables.input:
fetch dt.entity.service 
| fields id, entity.name, clustered_by[dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster],belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application_namespace]
| filter matchesValue(`clustered_by[dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster]`, "KUBERNETES_CLUSTER-B4A001031F545EE3")
| filter matchesValue(`belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application_namespace]`, "CLOUD_APPLICATION_NAMESPACE-908795E56153B60B")
| filter contains(entity.name, "Service")
| filterOut contains(entity.name, "grpc")
| fields service = entity.name
| fields service = replaceString(service, "[eks][prod] ", "")
| fields service = replaceString(service, "hipstershop.", "")
| fields service = replaceString(service, "(grpc://EmailService)", "")
| summarize distinctServices = collectDistinct(service)
| expand distinctServices
| sort distinctServices asc
| fields values = arrayRemoveNulls(array("ALL", distinctServices))

0.title: Apdex Catetory

2.title: Apdex by Category (Count)
2.query:
fetch spans
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "prod"
| filter span.kind == "server"
| filter isNotNull(endpoint.name)
| fieldsAdd service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter contains(service, "Service") 
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "[eks][prod] ", "")
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "hipstershop.", "")
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "(grpc://EmailService)", "")
| filter in($Service , "ALL") OR in(service, $Service)
| filter isNotNull(endpoint.name)

// Apdex Range 
//    Satisfied  = Less than 1 seconds
//    Tolerating = Greater than or equal to 1 seconds and less than 4 seconds
//    Frustrated = Greater than or equal to 4 seconds

| fieldsAdd Category = if((duration <= 1s), "Satisfied", 
                          else:if((duration > 1s and duration < 4s), "Tolerating",
                          else:if((duration >= 4s), "Frustrated"
                          )))                          
| summarize Satified = countIf(Category == "Satisfied"),
            Tolerating = countIf(Category == "Tolerating"),
            Frustrated = countIf(Category == "Frustrated"),
            Total = count(),
            by:{Service = service}

| fieldsAdd Apdex = asDouble((Satified + (.5 * Tolerating) + (0*Frustrated))/Total)
| fields Service, Apdex, Satified, Tolerating, Frustrated
| sort Apdex asc

3.title: Apdex by Category (Count)

4.title: Apdex by Category (%)

5.title: Apdex History
5.query:
fetch spans
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "prod"
| filter span.kind == "server"
| filter isNotNull(endpoint.name)
| fieldsAdd service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter contains(service, "Service") 
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "[eks][prod] ", "")
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "hipstershop.", "")
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "(grpc://EmailService)", "")
| filter in($Service , "ALL") OR in(service, $Service)
| filter isNotNull(endpoint.name)

// Apdex Range 
//    Satisfied  = Less than 2 seconds
//    Tolerating = Greater than or equal to 2 seconds and less than 8 seconds
//    Frustrated = Greater than or equal to 8 seconds

| fieldsAdd ApdexRange = if((duration <= 1s), "Satisfied", 
                          else:if((duration > 1s and duration < 4s), "Tolerating",
                          else:if((duration >= 4s), "Frustrated"
                          )))
                          
| summarize Satified = countIf(ApdexRange == "Satisfied"),
            Tolerating = countIf(ApdexRange == "Tolerating"),
            Frustrated = countIf(ApdexRange == "Frustrated"),
            Total = count(), by:{timestamp = bin(start_time, 1m)}
| fieldsAdd Apdex = asDouble((Satified + (.5 * Tolerating) + (0*Frustrated))/Total)
| makeTimeseries Apdex = avg(Apdex)

7.title: Apdex by Category (%)
7.query:
fetch spans
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "prod"
| filter span.kind == "server"
| filter isNotNull(endpoint.name)
| fieldsAdd service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter contains(service, "Service") 
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "[eks][prod] ", "")
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "hipstershop.", "")
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "(grpc://EmailService)", "")
| filter in($Service , "ALL") OR in(service, $Service)
| filter isNotNull(endpoint.name)

// Apdex Range 
//    Satisfied  = Less than 1 seconds
//    Tolerating = Greater than or equal to 1 seconds and less than 4 seconds
//    Frustrated = Greater than or equal to 4 seconds

| fieldsAdd Category = if((duration <= 1s), "Satisfied", 
                          else:if((duration > 1s and duration < 4s), "Tolerating",
                          else:if((duration >= 4s), "Frustrated"
                          )))                          
| summarize Satified = countIf(Category == "Satisfied"),
            Tolerating = countIf(Category == "Tolerating"),
            Frustrated = countIf(Category == "Frustrated"),
            Total = count(),
            by:{Service = service}

| fieldsAdd Apdex = asDouble((Satified + (.5 * Tolerating) + (0*Frustrated))/Total)
| fields Service, 
         Apdex, 
         Satified = (toDouble(Satified)/toDouble(Total)) * 100, 
         Tolerating = (toDouble(Tolerating)/toDouble(Total))*100,
         Frustrated = (toDouble(Frustrated)/toDouble(Total))*100,
         Total
| sort Apdex asc

9.query:
fetch spans
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "prod"
| filter span.kind == "server"
| filter isNotNull(endpoint.name)
| fieldsAdd service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter contains(service, "Service") 
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "[eks][prod] ", "")
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "hipstershop.", "")
| fieldsAdd service = replaceString(service, "(grpc://EmailService)", "")
| filter in($Service , "ALL") OR in(service, $Service)
| filter isNotNull(endpoint.name)

// Apdex Range 
//    Satisfied  = Less than 2 seconds
//    Tolerating = Greater than or equal to 2 seconds and less than 8 seconds
//    Frustrated = Greater than or equal to 8 seconds

| fieldsAdd ApdexRange = if((duration <= 1s), "Satisfied", 
                          else:if((duration > 1s and duration < 4s), "Tolerating",
                          else:if((duration >= 4s), "Frustrated"
                          )))
                          
| summarize Satified = countIf(ApdexRange == "Satisfied"),
            Tolerating = countIf(ApdexRange == "Tolerating"),
            Frustrated = countIf(ApdexRange == "Frustrated"),
            Total = count(), by:{timestamp = bin(start_time, 1m)}
| fieldsAdd Apdex = asDouble((Satified + (.5 * Tolerating) + (0*Frustrated))/Total)
| makeTimeseries ApdexSparkline = avg(Apdex)
| fieldsAdd ApdexSingleValue = arrayAvg(ApdexSparkline)
| fields ApdexSingleValue

11.query:
data record(Score = "0.94-1.0", `Performance level` = "Excellant"),
     record(Score = "0.85-0.94", `Performance level` = "Good"),
     record(Score = "0.7-0.85", `Performance level`= "Fair"),
     record(Score = "0.5-0.7 ", `Performance level`= "Poor"),
     record(Score = "<0.5", `Performance level`= "Unacceptable")

/*

| Score | Performance level |
| --- | --- |
| 0.94-1.0 | Excellant |
| 0.85-0.94 | Good |
| 0.7-0.85 | Fair |
| 0.5-0.7 | Poor |
| <0.5 | Unacceptable |
